備註：

  1. 本資料係由本校教務處、進修部、進修學院及計網中心所共同提供。
  2. 本資料僅供參考，不作其他證明之用，正式資料仍以教務處、進修部、進修學院所登錄之書面資料為準。
  3. 對於上述資料，如有任何疑義，請備妥相關證明文件至各部處成績管理單位查詢。

Remarks :

  1. The above information is for reference only. Official information is based on Office of Academic Affairs, Office of Continuing Education and Computer and Network Center.
  2. If have any question for academic performance, please inquire about relevant administration units of the Office of Academic Affairs (day school students) or the Office of Continuing Education (night school students)
